interaction_phrase: Ultimately, we believe this will make it easier for the wider community to understand and reproduce quantum algorithms.
occurrence_sentence: Circuit Designer was originally created for fault-tolerant quantum computing (FTQC) experts within PsiQuantum, but we believe that it can have broader utility.
